mapper.select: SELECT equipment_id, equipment_name, equipment_location, equipment_status, equipment_message FROM equipment
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment (equipment_name, equipment_location, equipment_status, equipment_message) VALUES (#{equipmentName}, #{equipmentLocation}, #{equipmentStatus}, #{equipmentMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT equipment_id, equipment_name, equipment_location, equipment_status, equipment_message FROM equipment WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}

SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_location, e.equipment_status, e.equipment_message FROM equipment e JOIN class_equipment ce ON e.equipment_id = ce.equipment_id WHERE ce.class_id = #{classId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment
AND ( CAST(equipment_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND equipment_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND equipment_status = #{status}
